[210:41]this just giant landmass.

[210:53]core in Europe. St. Petersburg, Moscow, all of the economic activity, all of the population,

[211:02]and historically, Russia is situated around this nucleus, this core, which is in Europe.

[211:28]It's actually not all that strategically important.

[211:31]There's not a ton of people. There's not a ton of resources out there. There's not any major cities.

[211:49]It's a giant, powerful state with 160 million people, with thousands of nuclear warheads,

[211:59]and a pretty large economy in Europe.

[212:22]Russia has a bigger population than all of them.

[212:24]Russia has a bigger military than all of them.

[212:27]Russia has more productive capacity than all of them.

[213:40]their production to create wealth. They use their wealth to secure more power.
